_meta.purpose: Locked test scenarios for PermitAssist engine quality evaluation. Run via scripts/run_eval.py to grade live prod responses against deterministic rubrics. Each case scores 0-100 based on rubric checks; aggregate is the engine's score.
_meta.notes: Cases mirror the 4-city Opus 4.7 review baselines (LA Hillside ADU, Phoenix restaurant TI, Vegas restaurant TI, Seattle restaurant TI) plus the 10-scenario Opus 4.7 grading sweep. Cache-bust suffix appended to job_type at runtime. Expanded for commercial vertical launch readiness: restaurant TI, medical/dental clinic TI, office TI, retail/change-of-use, and residential controls.
